items.title: Awesome Like My Daughter | Funny Tee Shirt, Sarcastic Saying Humor Dad Joke T-Shirt for Father Grandpa Daddy
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: awesome, like, daughter, sarcastic, saying, humor, dad, joke, father, grandpa, daddy. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
